mission.title: localai: PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models
mission.description: PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify localai troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your localai deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai -n localai --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review localai configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant localai configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai
kubectl get configmap -n localai -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=localai
```
**LocalAI version:**
image: quay.io/go-skynet/local-ai:v2.0.0-cublas-cuda12

Linux dev-aisrv01 6.1.0-13-amd64 #1 SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Debian 6.1.55-1 (2023-09-29) x86_64 GNU/Linux

We tried to run parallel requests against the codellama

steps.title: Apply the fix for PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf models
steps.description:
integrate changes from llama.cpp

Merged the Changes from https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/blob/master/examples/server/server.cpp
Hardcoded params.cont_batching to true! on line 2471 should this be loaded from env like LLAMACPP_PARALLEL?

- [ x] Yes, I signed my commits.
```yaml
DBG Loading Model codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf with gRPC (file: /models/codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf) (backend: llama): 
...  
singleActiveBackend:false parallelRequests:false}
```

steps.title: Confirm PARALLEL_REQUESTS=true has no effect on gguf… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=localai -n localai --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n localai --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
integrate changes from llama.cpp

Merged the Changes from https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp/blob/master/examples/server/server.cpp
Hardcoded params.cont_batching to true! on line 2471 should this be loaded from env like LLAMACPP_PARALLEL?

- [ x] Yes, I signed my commits.
codeSnippets: DBG GRPC(codellama-34b-instruct.Q4_K_M.gguf-127.0.0.1:45563): stderr CUDA error 1 at /build/backend/cpp/llama/llama.cpp/ggml-cuda.cu:7043: invalid argument

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with localai installed or the issue environment reproducible.
